angle: Comeback / discipline-flex — the 2-week May blackout as a trust signal
format: personality + record_flex (identity post, not a pick post)
voice: MY_VOICE_PROFILE.md — first person, casual swagger, ✅ on receipts, screenshot-worthy line, confident close
why_this_works: Inverts every betting-Twitter trope: everyone fakes infinite confidence and posts daily. 'I went dark because I didn't trust the math' is a rare honesty/standards flex. We lead with the pattern-interrupt + a curiosity gap ('not because I was losing'), pay it off with receipts, and plant ONE quotable standalone line to finally attack our zero-retweet gap (TWITTER_IMPROVEMENT_GUIDE.md).

hero_single.text:
I stopped posting for 2 weeks in May.

Not because I was losing.

Because I didn't trust my own numbers enough to put them in front of you.

Back since June 1 — here's every unit since:

✅ +35.73u overall
✅ +13.23u last 7 days
✅ +5.87u yesterday

Last 7: 20-12 · 62.5% · +12.5% ROI

Most accounts post every day and pray. I'd rather go dark than sell you a number I don't believe in.

Follow if you want to watch the rest of this month play out.

tweets:
I stopped posting for 2 weeks in May.

Not because I was losing — because I didn't trust my own numbers enough to put them in front of you.

Came back June 1. The tape since:

✅ +35.73u overall
✅ +13.23u last 7 days
✅ +5.87u yesterday

Last 7: 20-12 · 62.5% win · +12.5% ROI

The rule I run on: if I wouldn't put my own money on it, you never see it.

Most accounts post every day and pray. I'd rather go dark for two weeks than sell you a number I don't believe in.

For the crew on the site 👇

The sharps I track are most active ~30 min before game time — that's when value gets sniped. Always check back.

Plays lock 15 min before first pitch. Don't show up late.

alt_hooks: The most profitable thing I did all year was shut up for two weeks.
Every tout posts every single day. In May, I went dark for 14 — on purpose.
I didn't go quiet in May because I was cold. I went quiet because I respect your bankroll more than my own ego.
options.standalone_rt_line: I'd rather go dark for two weeks than sell you a number I don't believe in.

companion_site_post.type: separate post (do NOT mix with the story above)
companion_site_post.text:
Quick one for the site crew 👇

The sharps I track are most active ~30 minutes before game time — that's when value gets sniped and lines move.

Always check back before first pitch.

Plays lock on the site 15 minutes out. Late = you miss the move.

edits_from_original_draft: Moved the strongest words to line 1 and added a curiosity gap ('Not because I was losing') — the hook now hits on the first read instead of trailing off with '...enough'.
Split the post: the comeback/flex story and the site operational info (sharp timing + lock window) are now two separate posts. One post, one job.
Added a standalone, quotable kicker ('I'd rather go dark than sell you a number I don't believe in') to finally create retweet bait — our #1 documented gap.
Added ✅ to the receipts line to match niche emoji rate (75% vs our 26%).
Dropped 'quietly putting together an incredible month' — 'quietly' undercuts the act of flexing; replaced with a forward-looking confident CTA.
Cut 'thank you to everyone from the start' from the hero post — warm but a soft fade; it kills momentum. Save it for a standalone milestone post.
